description: Sector overlay for law firms, legal practitioners, legal-services documents, client files, professional conduct, client money, conflicts, privilege, and confidentiality in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Law and Legal. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Legal Profession Act, 1960 (Act 32)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / General Legal Council

primary_sources.name: Legal Profession (Professional Conduct and Etiquette) Rules, 1969 (LI 613)
Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2020 (Act 1044)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Financial Intelligence Centre

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Right to Information Act, 2019 (Act 989)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Right to Information Commission

rules.title: General Legal Council enrolment, practice, or professional status evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for General Legal Council, lawyer roll, practising certificate, professional status, or legal practitioner evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Client confidentiality, privilege, or file-protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for client confidentiality, legal privilege, privileged communication, client file, confidential information, or data protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Conflict-of-interest disclosure or avoidance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for conflict checks, opposing-party checks, disclosure, client consent, or conflict avoidance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Client account, receipt, or client-money record evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for client account records, receipts, trust/client money, accounting, or client ledger evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT due diligence evidence is present for in-scope legal services
rules.summary: Checks for client due diligence, beneficial ownership, KYC, source of funds, or suspicious transaction evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
